metadata.title: Save a Prayer (2001 Remaster)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:21.94] You saw me standing by the wall corner of a main street
[00:32.50] And the lights are flashing on your windowsill
[00:38.34] All alone ain't much fun, so you're looking for the thrill
[00:48.31] And you know just what it takes and where to go
[00:55.29] Don't say a prayer for me now
[01:01.75] Save it 'til the morning after
[01:04.62] No, don't say a prayer for me now
[01:09.02] Save it 'til the morning after
[01:30.24] Feel the breeze deep on the inside look you down into your well
[01:39.38] If you can, you'll see the world in all his fire
[01:45.54] Take a chance like all dreamers, you can't find another way
[01:56.28] You don't have to dream it all, just live a day
[02:04.74] Don't say a prayer for me now
[02:08.74] Save it 'til the morning after
[02:12.69] No, don't say a prayer for me now
[02:17.00] Save it 'til the morning after
[02:26.75] Save it 'til the morning after
[02:35.24] Save it 'til the morning after
[02:45.07] 
[02:53.31] Pretty looking road, I try to hold the rising floods that fill my skin
[03:03.73] Don't ask me why I'll keep my promise, melt the ice
[03:09.66] And you wanted to dance, so I asked you to dance, but fear is in your soul
[03:20.65] Some people call it a one-night stand, but we can call it paradise
[03:29.75] Don't say a prayer for me now
[03:33.30] Save it 'til the morning after
[03:37.56] No, don't say a prayer for me now
[03:41.50] Save it 'til the morning after
[03:49.89] Save it 'til the morning after
[03:59.16] Save it 'til the morning after
[04:07.78] Save it 'til the morning after
[04:16.17] Save it 'til the morning after
[04:34.52] Save a prayer 'til the morning after
[04:43.53] Save a prayer 'til the morning after
[04:51.87] Save a prayer 'til the morning after
[04:56.36] Save a prayer 'til the morning after
[05:00.15] Save a prayer 'til the morning after
[05:04.36] Save a prayer 'til the morning after
